info.title: CLOSUM API
info.description: CLOSUM V2.0 REST API covering CRM, messaging, automation, and webhooks. Closum is an inbound marketing platform focused on small and medium companies for landing pages, newsletters, and SMS marketing.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of leads. Available filters: email, name, contact_lifecycle_stage_id.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific lead.

post.description: Create a new lead. Either email or mobile_number is required.

post.summary: Add a note to a lead

put.description: Update an existing lead. You cannot change the lead email.
Update an existing lead identified by email address.

delete.description: Deletes a contact by ID and the associated lead data.
Permanently deletes a tag from the entire account and its associations with contacts, leads, and audiences.

post.description: Send a designed email template with custom merge variables.

email_to.description: JSON array of recipient email addresses

utm_tracking.description: Set to 1 to enable UTM parameters

post.description: Create a new email template with HTML content.

template_title.description: The title of the new template

html_content.description: The HTML content of the template. Max length: 1048576

post.description: Update an existing email template with modified HTML content.

html_content.description: The updated HTML content. Max length: 1048576

get.description: Retrieve email activity logs with optional filters.

url.description: The full URL to be shortened

update_enabled.description: Set to true to update existing contact in the same request

sender.description: Max 11 characters, no special characters allowed

from.description: Virtual phone number, start with country code (e.g. 351910000000)

to.description: Recipient phone number, start with country code

parameters.description: Only send parameters if the template has variables
